label: About
title: About Wired Broccoli Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 21 recent saved-signal files and 63 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @itsolelehmann: i'm obsessed with AI DIY projects. my favorite one right now is this broccoli... and Broccoli Artwork is a unique and beautiful dark green stem broccoli that has only recently..., plus 7 more. A source image from all-americaselections.org helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Wired Broccoli Field: Make an overhead scan plate using a diagrammatic fold composition: a cultivated surface where branching broccoli-like stems become living circuit traces, not a centered produce portrait. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central pale branching stem-and-channel crown, right dense broccoli floret architecture, and left circular dew lens on leaf edge.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
